  "findings": [
    "Thermal growth offset not accounted for in shaft alignment on hot service equipment.",
    "Potential for severe misalignment when machinery reaches operating temperature."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Shut down equipment immediately if excessive vibration or temperature is observed.",
    "Perform alignment check and correction incorporating calculated thermal growth offsets as per API 686.",
    "Update maintenance procedures to include thermal growth compensation for all hot-service rotating equipment."
  ],
  "rationale": "Ignoring thermal growth offset on hot service equipment will cause significant misalignment at operating temperature, leading to accelerated coupling wear, bearing failure, and potential catastrophic shaft or seal failure. API 686 requires consideration of thermal growth in alignment procedures. Operation in this state constitutes a critical safety and reliability risk.",
  "references": ["API 686", "laser system manuals (thermal growth prediction modules)"]
}
